extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE Julian won sprinting through the center after CARAPAZ Richard's attack opened the door, beating LAPORTE Christophe who was positioned on VINGEGAARD Jonas's wheel.
tactical_patterns: VINGEGAARD Jonas positioned at front inside final kilometer despite no GC implications, delivering LAPORTE Christophe perfectly.
CARAPAZ Richard's late attack 200m out opened sprint, allowing ALAPHILIPPE Julian center lane opportunity through chaos.
EF multiple probing moves final 2km softened Jumbo-Visma train before CARAPAZ Richard's decisive acceleration.
BAYER Tobias attacked over final climb top at 25km/h but lacked support, absorbed before finish circuits.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: sprinted through center after critics doubted form, capitalized on CARAPAZ Richard opening the race
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: led out sprinter despite being GC leader, shows tactical flexibility beyond climbing
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: launched late attack inside 200m creating chaos but mistimed final sprint
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: neutral: perfectly positioned behind VINGEGAARD Jonas but lacked final 100m acceleration when needed
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: neutral: recovering from long covid fatigue but looked prepared, positioned well in peloton
rider_signals.GRONDIN Donavan: negative: cramped in KOM jersey 50km from finish, highlights vulnerability holding jersey under fatigue
rider_signals.BAYER Tobias: neutral: strong solo move over final climb but lacked support riders, absorbed by organized teams
